evidence.clean_text: Between around 2012 and 2015 three of the Defendant’s agencies used spyware produced by the ‘Hacking Team’, which is (or was) a commercial spyware company based in Italy. Further, in 2014 and 2015 various servers were found to be running software produced by FinFisher GmbH and/or the Gamma Group (other spyware companies) from within Saudi Arabia, which it can be inferred were used by the Defendant (see POC at [30-31]).
